custom/music.exec: song=$(playerctl --player=spotify metadata --format '{{ artist }} - {{ title }}' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$song" ] && [ "$song" != " - " ]; then if [ ${#song} -gt 50 ]; then song=$(echo "$song" | cut -c1-47)...; fi; printf " $song"; else song=$(playerctl metadata --format '{{ artist }} - {{ title }}' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$song" ] && [ "$song" != " - " ]; then if [ ${#song} -gt 50 ]; then song=$(echo "$song" | cut -c1-47)...; fi; printf " $song"; fi; fi

custom/gammastep.exec: if ! pgrep -f 'gammastep' > /dev/null; then printf '\uf185'; else hour=$(date +%H); if [ "$hour" -ge 6 ] && [ "$hour" -lt 19 ]; then printf '\uf185'; else printf '\uf186'; fi; fi

custom/vpn.exec: if systemctl is-active --quiet wg-quick-mullvad; then printf ' VPN-On'; else printf ' VPN-Off'; fi

custom/network.exec: ethernet_device=$(nmcli -t -f device,type,state dev | grep 'ethernet:connected' | head -1 | cut -d: -f1); if [ -n "$ethernet_device" ]; then printf '\uef44 Ethernet'; else wifi_ssid=$(nmcli -t -f active,ssid dev wifi | grep '^yes:' | cut -d: -f2); if [ -n "$wifi_ssid" ]; then printf '\uf1eb %s' "$wifi_ssid"; else printf '\uf1eb Connect'; fi; fi

custom/bluetooth.exec: connected_device=$(bluetoothctl devices Connected | head -n1 | cut -d ' ' -f 3-); if [ -n "$connected_device" ]; then printf "\uf294 %s" "$connected_device"; else printf "\uf294 Off"; fi

custom/volume.exec: volume=$(pactl get-sink-volume @DEFAULT_SINK@ | awk '{print $5}' | tr -d '%'); if [ -n "$volume" ]; then printf ' %s%%' "$volume"; else printf ' --%%'; fi

custom/battery.exec: capacity=$(cat /sys/class/power_supply/BAT0/capacity); status=$(cat /sys/class/power_supply/BAT0/status); if [ "$status" = "Charging" ]; then printf ' %s%%' "$capacity"; else if [ "$capacity" -ge 90 ]; then icon=$''; elif [ "$capacity" -ge 70 ]; then icon=$''; elif [ "$capacity" -ge 50 ]; then icon=$''; elif [ "$capacity" -ge 25 ]; then icon=$''; else icon=$''; fi; printf '%s %s%%' "$icon" "$capacity"; fi
